stemHtml:
Choose the accurate statements concerning the revalidation of an A320 type rating:

1. Revalidation may be completed after flying on line for 10 sectors on the A320 
2. Revalidation may be completed after flying on line for 12 sectors on the A320 
3. Revalidation may be completed within 3 months preceding the expiry date 
4. Revalidation may be completed within 6 months preceding the expiry date
